channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Israel moves to formally recognize Armenian WWI deaths as a genocide
item.description: Israel's Cabinet approved a proposal to designate violence against Armenians by the Ottoman Empire during World War I as a genocide. The step reflects deteriorating ties between Israel and Turkey.
item.content:encoded:
Israel's Cabinet approved a proposal to designate violence against Armenians by the Ottoman Empire during World War I as a genocide. The step reflects deteriorating ties between Israel and Turkey.

(Image credit: Oded Balilty)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Australia to double potential fines over child social media accounts
item.description: Australia plans to double potential fines for social media platforms, including Facebook and Instagram, who fail to prevent Australian children from holding accounts.
item.content:encoded:
Australia plans to double potential fines for social media platforms, including Facebook and Instagram, who fail to prevent Australian children from holding accounts.

(Image credit: Rick Rycroft)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: A 'heat dome' is driving dangerous heat across the U.S. into the July 4 weekend
item.description: Dangerous heat is expected across large swaths of the U.S. this week, according to the National Weather Service.
item.content:encoded:
Dangerous heat is expected across large swaths of the U.S. this week, according to the National Weather Service.

(Image credit: Adam Gray)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: In Venezuela, silence has become a rescue tool
item.description: In Venezuela rescue crews now stop almost everything and ask for silence so they can hear anyone still alive underneath the rubble. NPR's Eyder Peralta reports from the port city of La Guaira.
item.content:encoded: In Venezuela rescue crews now stop almost everything and ask for silence so they can hear anyone still alive underneath the rubble. NPR's Eyder Peralta reports from the port city of La Guaira.
item.dc:creator: Eyder Peralta

item.title: A bridge to Canada may be blocked by the Trump administration
item.description: The Gordie Howe bridge spans the most important border crossing between the U.S. and Canada. President Donald Trump has said he doesn't want it open yet.
item.content:encoded:
The Gordie Howe bridge spans the most important border crossing between the U.S. and Canada. President Donald Trump has said he doesn't want it open yet.

(Image credit: Henry Larson)
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes, underscoring the fragility of the ceasefire
item.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating their framework agreement, and Tehran threatened to halt negotiations with the U.S. entirely. Meanwhile, violence continued between Israel and Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump accused Iran of violating their framework agreement, and Tehran threatened to halt negotiations with the U.S. entirely. Meanwhile, violence continued between Israel and Hezbollah.

(Image credit: Hadi Mizban/AP Photo/Hadi Mizban)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: Trade tensions shake up Brazil's caipirinha spirit
item.description: U.S. tariff pressure is pushing Europe and Brazil closer—opening new global doors for everything from aircraft parts to Brazil's cachaça, the base of the caipirinha.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. tariff pressure is pushing Europe and Brazil closer—opening new global doors for everything from aircraft parts to Brazil's cachaça, the base of the caipirinha.

(Image credit: Alan Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Catherine Osborn

item.title: 3 firefighters killed on Colorado-Utah border as wildfires intensify
item.description: The deaths occurred as crews battled multiple fires across a parched region. Two other firefighters were injured.
item.content:encoded:
The deaths occurred as crews battled multiple fires across a parched region. Two other firefighters were injured.

(Image credit: Ty ONeil)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: These church members disagree on politics. Together they're wiping out medical debt
item.description: Trinity Moravian Church, a politically diverse congregation in Winston-Salem, N. C., has been raising money to retire medical debt in the surrounding community.
item.content:encoded:
Trinity Moravian Church, a politically diverse congregation in Winston-Salem, N. C., has been raising money to retire medical debt in the surrounding community.

(Image credit: Allison Lee Isley)
item.dc:creator: Noam Levey

item.title: Win the family cookout with perfectly cooked hot dogs
item.description: Microwave or air fryer? Grill or slow cooker? An investigation into how to cook hot dogs for the most flavor and the most joy.
item.content:encoded:
Microwave or air fryer? Grill or slow cooker? An investigation into how to cook hot dogs for the most flavor and the most joy.

(Image credit: Ayesha Rascoe)
item.dc:creator: Dianna Douglas
